message:
test(semantic): Add embedding semantic quality verification tests

Add comprehensive tests to verify embeddings capture semantic meaning:
- compare_embedder_quality.rs: Compare all embedders (hash, Model2Vec, transformer)
- semantic_quality_test.rs: Test similarity pairs, topic clustering, query matching

Results show Model2Vec achieves comparable semantic separation (0.44 gap) to
transformers (0.47 gap) while being 140-224x faster. All models achieve perfect
ranking on query-document retrieval tests.

Also includes hash-fnv1a-384 benchmark results for baseline comparison.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
